ogTitle: Gledhow vs Glen Iris: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gledhow and Glen Iris.
heading: Gledhow vs Glen Iris — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gledhow, Western Australia and Glen Iris, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gledhow has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Glen Iris (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gledhow or Glen Iris safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gledhow has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Glen Iris scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gledhow scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Iris scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gledhow or Glen Iris?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gledhow has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
